nodes.name: Chat flycatcher
nodes.summary: Chat flycatcher（Chat flycatcher，学名 Agricola infuscatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原、灌丛。

nodes.name: Andrew Smith (zoologist)
nodes.summary: Andrew Smith (zoologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括Swainson's spurfowl、Swamp nightjar、African barred owlet等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 南非
nodes.summary: 南非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联195种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、非洲黑鴨、Shelley's francolin等195种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 安哥拉
nodes.summary: 安哥拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联230种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Black guinea fowl、Western crested guinea fowl等230种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Agricola infuscatus |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22709040A263876477 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22709040A263876477.en |access-date=12 February 2025}} | genus = Agricola | species = infuscatus | authority = (Smith, A, 1839) | synonyms = Bradornis infuscatusMelaenornis infuscatusSaxicola infuscata }} The chat flycatcher (Agricola infuscatus) is a small passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is native to southern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chat flycatcher is found in South Africa, Botswana and Angola. The flycatcher frequently perches on low-lying bushes and telephone wires. Its natural habitat is dry savanna

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chat flycatcher is found in South Africa, Botswana and Angola. The flycatcher frequently perches on low-lying bushes and telephone wires. Its natural habitat is dry savanna

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The chat flycatcher is found in South Africa, Botswana and Angola. The flycatcher frequently perches on low-lying bushes and telephone wires. Its natural habitat is dry savanna

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: However, it is also found in shrublands and woodlands throughout its range
